name: BigCommerce
description: BigCommerce is an enterprise e-commerce platform providing REST APIs to manage online stores. Agents can programmatically manage products, orders, customers, carts, categories, and brands across BigCommerce storefronts.

capabilities.name: products_list
capabilities.description: Retrieve a paginated list of products with filtering by name, SKU, price, availability, and category.

capabilities.name: products_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve a single product by ID with all details, variants, and images.

capabilities.name: products_create
capabilities.description: Create a new product with name, type, price, weight, SKU, and categories.

capabilities.name: products_update
capabilities.description: Update an existing product by ID.

capabilities.name: products_delete
capabilities.description: Delete a product by its ID.

capabilities.name: orders_list
capabilities.description: Retrieve a paginated list of orders with filtering by status, customer, and date ranges.

capabilities.name: orders_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve full details of a specific order including line items and shipping.

capabilities.name: customers_list
capabilities.description: Retrieve a paginated list of customers with filtering by name, email, and company.

capabilities.name: customers_create
capabilities.description: Create one or more new customers.

capabilities.name: carts_create
capabilities.description: Create a new shopping cart with line items and customer ID.

capabilities.name: carts_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve a cart by ID with line items and totals.

capabilities.name: categories_list
capabilities.description: Retrieve all categories in the store.

capabilities.name: brands_list
capabilities.description: Retrieve all brands in the catalog.

capabilities.name: brands_create
capabilities.description: Create a new brand in the catalog.
